'''Yves Arsen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] and the owner of [[Spirited Spirits]]. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], his head of R&D, [[Shayne Gerrare]], disappeared along with most of his stockboys, to join the [[Cularin resistance]]. Arsen regretted only Gerrare's absence.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}} {{1st}}
